# Relation Bracket Array @doc(team.relation-bracket-array)

Bracket relation arrays preserve ordered object links.

::glossary billing.credits
--
Credits are balance adjustments that reduce future invoices.
::

::claim billing.ledger
status: draft
--
The ledger records every account balance movement.
::

::claim billing.refunds
status: draft
depends_on: [billing.credits, billing.ledger]
--
Refund workflows depend on both credit semantics and ledger entries.
::
